summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of personal finance tracker dashboard. All 10 specified features tested successfully with excellent functionality.
passed_tests: All-Time Totals always visible at top (Income, Maaser Owed, Balance, Given)
View Period selector works (All Time, This Year, This Month buttons)
Monthly Summary shows only when Month view selected
Yearly Summary shows only when Year view selected
Filters panel - transaction type filters (Income, Give)
Filters panel - recurring status filters (All, Recurring Only, One-time Only)
Hebrew calendar toggle works in month view
